name: Angel Food Cake (Kh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Sift together the flour, 3/4 cup sugar, and salt into a bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites with tartar until soft peaks form.
4. Add remaining sugar, 2 tablespoons at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Add almond extract.
6. Sift 1/4 cup of the flour mixture over the whites; gently fold in.
7. Fold in the remaining flour mixture, 1/4 cup at a time.
8. Pour batter into an ungreased, 10-inch tube pan.
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes.
10. Turn the pan upside down on a wire rack and let the cake cool in the pan for 1 hour. The cake should come out of its own accord.
